name: Orange-Sour Cream Cookies
recipeInstructions: Cream together the 2 cups of sugar and 2 sticks of butter (or margarine). Beat in the 3 eggs. Mix in the sour cream alternately with the dry ingredients. Stir in the juice and rind of 2 oranges. Drop by teaspoonsful onto a greased cookie sheet. Bake at 400°F for 8-10 minutes, checking after 6 minutes. For icing, mix together the last 4 ingredients (3 tbsp butter or margarine, 2/3 cup powdered sugar, juice and rind of one orange, and milk as needed). Spread over cooled cookies. Makes about 24 cookies.
